rules.description: In a production scenario, the IoT Hub tier should not be Free because the Free tier does not provide the necessary Service Level Agreement.
rules.fix: use the Free tier does not provide the necessary Service Level Agreement

rules.description: Using message routing for custom endpoints in IoT Hub, messages might not reach these destinations if specific conditions are unmet. A default route ensures all messages are received, but disabling this safety net risks leaving some messages undelivered.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
